subject: Appointment Confirmation - Dr. Wang
body:
Dear Ms. Van Der Woodsen,

This is to confirm your appointment:
- Doctor: Dr. Ming Wang (Cardiologist)
- Date: January 11, 2026
- Time: 14:00
- Location: City Hospital, Building A, Room 302

Please arrive 10 minutes early for check-in.

Best regards,
City Hospital

subject: Preparation for Your Visit
body:
Dear Alice,

I'm looking forward to our consultation tomorrow. To make the most of our time together, please remember to bring:

1. Your BLUE medical record book (the one with handwritten blood pressure logs)
2. A list of all current medications
3. Any questions you'd like to discuss

We need to compare your recent blood pressure readings with the December data. This is important for adjusting your treatment plan.

See you tomorrow!
Dr. Wang

subject: Fresh Deals This Week! 🛒
body: Don't miss out! Strawberries 50% off, fresh salmon €4.99/kg...

subject: Dinner Plans
body:
Hi Mom,

Just wanted to let you know I'll come over for dinner on Wednesday evening around 6 PM. Don't worry about cooking anything fancy - I'll bring takeout!

Love you,
Sarah
